name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies from Heaven
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in eggs, peanut butter, and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add flour, cornstarch, salt, baking soda, and baking powder, mixing until just combined.
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Roll the dough into balls about 1 1/2 tablespoons each and place onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Flatten the cookies slightly with a fork or your fingers (they don't flatten much while cooking).
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
8. Makes 3-4 dozen cookies.
